en: Remember, O LORD, what has befallen us; look, and see our disgrace!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你記念我們所遭遇的！垂顧關注我們的恥辱。

en: Our inheritance has been turned over to strangers, our homes to foreigners.
zh: 我們的產業轉歸外人，我們的房屋歸給異族。

en: We have become orphans, fatherless; our mothers are like widows.
zh: 我們成為孤兒，沒有父親，我們的母親好像寡婦一樣。

en: We must pay for the water we drink; the wood we get must be bought.
zh: 我們所喝的水要用銀子買，我們的柴也付代價而得。

en: Our pursuers are at our necks; we are weary; we are given no rest.
zh: 我們被人追趕，頸項帶上重軛；我們疲乏，得不著歇息。

en: We have given the hand to Egypt, and to Assyria, to get bread enough.
zh: 我們臣服埃及和亞述，為要得著糧食充飢。

en: Our fathers sinned, and are no more; and we bear their iniquities.
zh: 我們的先祖犯了罪，現在他們不在了；我們卻要擔負他們的罪孽。

en: Slaves rule over us; there is none to deliver us from their hand.
zh: 奴僕轄制我們；沒有人救我們脫離他們的手。

en: We get our bread at the peril of our lives, because of the sword in the wilderness.
zh: 因為曠野有刀劍的威脅，我們要冒生命的危險才得到糧食。

en: Our skin is hot as an oven with the burning heat of famine.
zh: 我們因飢餓而發燒，我們的皮膚好像火爐一般的熱。

en: Women are raped in Zion, young women in the towns of Judah.
zh: 婦女在錫安被污辱，處女在猶大的城鎮被強暴。

en: Princes are hung up by their hands; no respect is shown to the elders.
zh: 眾領袖被敵人吊起來；長老也不受人尊敬。

en: Young men are compelled to grind at the mill, and boys stagger under loads of wood.
zh: 青年人推磨吃苦；孩童因背木柴而跌倒。

en: The old men have left the city gate, the young men their music.
zh: 眾長老不再坐在城門口；青年人不再唱歌作樂。

en: The joy of our hearts has ceased; our dancing has been turned to mourning.
zh: 我們心裡不再歡樂；我們的舞蹈變為哀哭。

en: The crown has fallen from our head; woe to us, for we have sinned!
zh: 冠冕從我們的頭上掉下來。我們有禍了；因為我們犯了罪。

en: For this our heart has become sick, for these things our eyes have grown dim,
zh: 為了這事，我們心裡愁煩；為了這事，我們的眼睛昏花；

en: for Mount Zion which lies desolate; jackals prowl over it.
zh: 因為錫安山荒涼，野狗就在山上到處出沒。 祈求復興

en: But you, O LORD, reign forever; your throne endures to all generations.
zh: 但耶和華啊，你永遠坐著為王；你的寶座代代長存。

en: Why do you forget us forever, why do you forsake us for so many days?
zh: 你為甚麼永遠忘記我們？為甚麼長久離棄我們？

en: Restore us to yourself, O LORD, that we may be restored! Renew our days as of old-
zh: 耶和華啊！除非你真的棄絕我們， 你向我們所發的怒氣難收， 不然，求你使我們歸向你，好使我們回轉過來； 求你更新我們的日子，像古時一樣。

en: unless you have utterly rejected us, and you remain exceedingly angry with us.
